title: transcript_ingest_result
description: Phase Z.4 — the per-transcript outcome of corpus ingest. status='present' only when format validation passed AND speaker-turn chunking produced a chunked_transcript artifact; otherwise status='blocked' with reason='ingest_format_error' and a detail naming which check failed. One bad transcript never blocks the others (corpus-level isolation is enforced by ingest_corpus.py, not this record).
